mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.title, LEFT(regexp_replace(c.body, '<[^>]*>', '', 'g'), 200) AS summary, c.created_at, t.name AS tag FROM content c JOIN topic t ON c.topic_id = t.id ORDER BY c.created_at DESC

SELECT c.id, c.title, LEFT(regexp_replace(c.body, '<[^>]*>', '', 'g'), 200) AS summary, c.created_at, t.name AS tag FROM content c JOIN topic t ON c.topic_id = t.id WHERE c.title ILIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' OR regexp_replace(c.body, '<[^>]*>', '', 'g') ILIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
SELECT c.id, c.author_id, c.title, c.body, c.created_at, t.name AS tag FROM content c JOIN topic t ON c.topic_id = t.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
SELECT id, name FROM topic ORDER BY name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO content (topic_id, title, body, author_id) VALUES (#{topicId}, #{title}, #{body}, #{authorId})
mapper.update: UPDATE content SET topic_id = #{req.topicId}, title = #{req.title}, body = #{req.body}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
